title: Too Many Overhauls
description: A fabric mod pack that completely overhauls and changes every part of the minecraft experience
body:
# Too Many Overhauls
**Too Many Overhauls** is a fabric mod pack that completely overhauls and changes every part of the minecraft experience.

![A village with windmills from the Create Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea6c16478412bbd92c30fc19dd424998ad505414_0.webp)

### Notable features:
> - Lots (and i mean lots) of Quality of life Features
> - Improved World generation and structures in Overworld, End and Nether
> - Seasons
> - Improved Combat
> - New Bosses and Enemies and Mobs
> - More Building Blocks
> - [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) Mod Blocks and Mechanics
> - Improved Player Movement
> - Multiplayer with [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)
